data.arabic_text: ((لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظّالِمِينَ)).
data.english_text: (None has the right to be worshipped except You.  How perfect You are, verily I was among the wrong-doers.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (La ilaha illa anta subhanaka innee kuntu minath-thalimeen.)
